title: Implement IPv6 prefix delegation and WiFi backhaul for Zephyr gateway
description: Research and implement prefix delegation from upstream (WiFi/Eth) to RPL mesh in lichen/apps/gateway. Update sixlowpan/routing configs, add routing logic, enable in board configs. Parallel WiFi backhaul tasks. Follow no-dead-code, security. Test build, 3 codereviews, close bead.
